absorption: ASK absorption at vPOC. High positive delta (+697) failed to lift the price, indicating passive sellers are absorbing aggressive buyers.
dom_observation: Large stacked ask walls at 60300 and 60400 are capping the upside, confirming resistance.
reasoning: Fiyat, yuksek pozitif deltaya ragmen vPOC seviyesinde yukselmeyi basaramadi, bu da agresif alicilarin pasif saticilar tarafindan absorbe edildigini gosteren net bir ASK absorption sinyalidir.
